trigger_command:
git add index.html src/main.tsx vite.config.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: add process polyfill in HTML head for Node.js deps

@ai-sdk/google-vertex (optional SDK peer dep) pulls in
google-auth-library which references process.* at module init.
Inline polyfill in <head> runs before any JS bundle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push origin main 2>&1
